title: JeremySeq's Damage Indicator
body:
![Damage Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace07e263cc77b35d955e93b1fddcdc5e5b715f1.png)

No more guessing or searching for enemies! With the Damage Indicator, you'll instantly know the source of incoming damage.

This mod was inspired by the damage indicators in many popular first person shooter games.

**2.0 and onward is client-side.**
**1.0 requires the mod to be on the server.**

## Features
- **Directional Damage Indicator**: an arrow pointing in the direction of any incoming damage
- **Damage Text**: text showing the amount of damage dealt to other mobs
- **Health Bars**: a text health bar for other mobs
- **Blood Overlay (disabled by default)**: an overlay of red outlining your screen when you take damage

## Config
- There is one config file called "damageindicator-client.toml"
You can...
- enable/disable each feature
- change the color, placement, timing, and texture of the directional indicator
- make the health bar only show for targeted mobs

![Damage Indicator In-game Example](https://i.imgur.com/EBz2168.png)

![Damage Text In-game Example](https://i.imgur.com/eo36dVI.png)

**While you're here, check out ProtonMC – a free self-hostable control panel for Minecraft servers, built and maintained entirely by me. Click the image below for more details.**

[![ProtonMC advertisement](https://i.imgur.com/VQwArCz.png)](https://jeremyseq.gumroad.com/l/protonmc)
